title: Vehicle Insurance Fraud Detection
tagline: Multi-agent ML pipeline for claim-level fraud probability
description: LangGraph-orchestrated pipeline (preprocess → train → evaluate → select → infer → decide) over the Vehicle Insurance Fraud dataset. Three classifiers (LR / RF / XGBoost) with SMOTE on the training fold only; an OpenAI call turns the score into a plain-English explanation and a recommended action for the claims officer.

title: LexScan — Legal Clause Intelligence
tagline: Fine-tuned Legal-BERT classifier over 38 CUAD clause types
description: Two-stage system: a fine-tuned Legal-BERT detects which contract clauses are present in an uploaded document with per-clause threshold tuning; GPT-4o-mini then locates the supporting excerpt, grades its risk for the user's party role, and explains it in plain English. Macro-F1 ≥ 0.70 on held-out CUAD contracts.

title: Shark Tank — Causal Analysis
tagline: PSM + DiD on 17 seasons of Shark Tank US
description: Two-notebook study: scrapes the out-of-business and acquisition lists, augments the base panel with Google Trends, then runs Propensity Score Matching, an event study around episode air date, and a PSM-DiD on the matched sample to isolate the incremental effect of receiving a deal — with placebo and exact-matching robustness.

title: VerifyAI — Agentic KYC Onboarding
tagline: Human-in-the-loop KYC pipeline driven by an autonomous agent
description: A clickable single-page mockup of a four-screen agentic KYC flow. The agent runs OCR, authenticity, and sanctions/PEP checks autonomously, then pauses with a natural-language explanation and structured options for a compliance analyst when its confidence drops. Audit reference is recorded for every override.
